title: SkitsDubstepGuns
description: SkitsDubstepGuns is a nostalgic return of the original Dubstep Gun mod.
body:
**SkitsDubstepGuns** is a recreation to the original Dubstep Gun mod that was popular years ago. 
![Requires Fabric API](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cbbd59fdc2549cf5d80272ac962d7a3ec8f0089_0.webp)

**💥 Redstone Dupstep Gun**
* 🔋 **Consumes Redstone** as ammo.
* 🎧 **Plays the track "Energy Drink"** (by Virtual Riot) when fired.
* 🧟 **Destroys mobs with the power of DUBSTEP.**
  ![Redstone Dupstep Gun Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c79d55dbe8369a75b9249142382a16e6fcfd7060.png)

**🧪 Future Plans**
* 🎵 Add more dubstep guns with different tracks and abilities.
* 🎨 Better models and textures for each gun.
* 🛠️ Config options for ammo usage, song volume, and visual effects.
* 🎚️ Custom soundtracks for guns.

**📝 Notes**
* Mod currently includes one gun. More coming soon!
* I don't **not** own the rights to "Energy Drink" (its non copyright) — This mod is a fan project only.
